title: canarium denticulatum subsp. kostermansii
intro: Canarium denticulatum subsp. kostermansii is a plant species of the genus Canarium, also known as a type of Canarium tree, which is native to New Guinea and nearby islands. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its seeds, which contain oils and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, fever, and skin conditions, among other health benefits. In herbal preparations, Canarium denticulatum subsp. kostermansii seeds are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments for topical application, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
